title: Lead Investment Banker at Deloitte India

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Deloitte India
jsonLd.description:
Deloitte India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Deloitte India:
Deloitte India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India!
